title: Outer Glow Feather & Lunar
description:
When you can see someone's outer layer in tab, they have an outline around their head
Modified to be compatible with Feather and Lunar Client
body:
**Outer Glow** is a mod that allows you to see when a player is nearby with their Hat (outer layer) enabled. It's a very simple mod that's awesome for Minecraft SMPs!

**[If you are not on Feather or Lunar Client, click here.](https://modrinth.com/mod/outerglow)**

This version does not shift over usernames by a pixel (when it does, it is incompatible with Feather & Lunar), so they may look a little strange in tab.

![Shows an outline around your head which is what it looks like when someone has their outer layer on and is near you.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b83885a72d798d7bf464b7d27cd6043d94dd095.png)
